name: Applications
description: Holds applicant submissions from the public intake wizard. Anonymous (no-login) users can CREATE rows via the public app; the table is NOT publicly readable. Internal staff read rows scoped to their assigned sites via selectedSiteId (P0.3 usePersona siteIds). Partner-referral rows carry only the 5 screener booleans + status (no PII). Demographic and contact fields are staff-read only and must never be surfaced on any public screen.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: holdReason
columns.description: Reason the application is on Hold (required when status = Hold)

columns.name: screenerQ1
columns.description: Screener: business is headquartered in Central Florida (CFL HQ). DRAFT wording.

columns.name: screenerQ2
columns.description: Screener: business is for-profit. DRAFT wording.

columns.name: screenerQ3
columns.description: Screener: business is independent of a franchise. DRAFT wording.

columns.name: screenerQ4
columns.description: Screener: business is scalable. DRAFT wording.

columns.name: screenerQ5
columns.description: Screener: business is technology / innovation-driven. DRAFT wording.

columns.name: recommendedTrack
columns.description: Track the applicant selected / was routed to

columns.name: programFit
columns.description: Why the program is a fit

columns.name: referralSource
columns.description: How the applicant heard about the program (optional)

columns.name: selectedSiteId
columns.description: Incubator site the applicant selected; drives staff site-scope

columns.name: followUpDate
columns.description: Follow-up date for a held application (required when status = Hold). ISO 8601 date string, format: YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. 2025-09-30.
